prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to the regulations and processes governed by the Environment Agency, which operates in England and Wales. Scotland has its own regulatory body, SEPA (Scottish Environment Protection Agency), and separate environmental permitting regulations.
